title: citrus × aurantium subf. sinograndis
intro: Citrus × aurantium subf. sinograndis, also known as bitter orange or Seville orange, is a plant species that is a hybrid of Citrus aurantium and another citrus species. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate the digestive system, reduce anxiety, and act as a natural diuretic. The health benefits of Citrus × aurantium subf. sinograndis include its potential to aid in weight loss, improve circulation, and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, it is often used to make teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to support digestive health and boost mood.
